title: La gran jornada
director: David Howard, Sam Schneider, Raoul Walsh
writer: Hal G. Evarts (story), Francisco Moré de la Torre, Paul Perez
actors: George J. Lewis, Carmen Guerrero, Roberto E. Guzmán, Martin Garralaga
plot: Spanish-language version of the early John Wayne film The Big Trail, filmed simultaneously. Raul Coleman (named Breck Coleman in the U.S. version) leads settlers in covered wagons westward across the great prairie and mountains.
